name: Tripo 3D Generation Tool
description: Generate 3D models using Tripo via DashScope (text-to-3D, image-to-3D, multi-image-to-3D)

description_i18n.zh-CN: 使用 Tripo 模型生成 3D 模型（文生3D、图生3D、多图生3D）
description_i18n.en-US: Generate 3D models using Tripo via DashScope (text-to-3D, image-to-3D, multi-image-to-3D)

author: QwenPaw Team

tools.name: text_to_3d_tripo
tools.description: Generate 3D models from text prompts using Tripo

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: DashScope API Key
config_fields.help: Get your API key from https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/

config_fields.name: model
config_fields.label: Model
config_fields.help: P1.0: Fast preview (~20K faces). H3.1: Film-grade (~2M faces, slower)

config_fields.name: texture_quality
config_fields.label: Texture Quality
config_fields.help: Texture quality of the generated 3D model
